scripts.bake:demo-shapes: node scripts/bake-shape-points.mjs assets/shapes-src/demo-gramophone/gramophone/scene.gltf assets/shapes/demo-gramophone 'https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/gramophone-2458f980cf584c45a130df3fc39d47ff' 'CC-BY-4.0' 450000 && node scripts/bake-shape-points.mjs assets/shapes-src/demo-cassette/sony_cassette/scene.gltf assets/shapes/demo-cassette 'https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/sony-cassette-0bdcf9e02a8a4abd8ef61f21fdddd119' 'CC-BY-4.0' 450000 'z90,x90' && node scripts/bake-shape-points.mjs assets/shapes-src/demo-headphones/headphones/scene.gltf assets/shapes/demo-headphones 'https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/headphones-9787e82ab3f441ac874490ecf369980b' 'CC-BY-4.0' 450000 && node scripts/bake-shape-points.mjs assets/shapes-src/demo-mic/shure_super_55/scene.gltf assets/shapes/demo-mic 'https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/shure-super-55-fac08019fef5474189f965bb495771eb' 'CC-BY-4.0' 450000
scripts.dist: npm run build && bash scripts/make-icns.sh && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
